name: com.ezg.reddot
description: Reusable event-driven red-dot / badge indicator system. BaseRedDot toggles a target GameObject when a TigerForge event key fires, keeping the core free of game-specific data. An Editor menu scaffolds the project-side RedDotId/RedDotBadge classes into a consuming project with pinned GUIDs so reused UI prefabs keep their script references.
